record.field: Imports on which VAT is not charged
Local Purchases on which VAT is not charged
Goods Purchased from Non VAT Registered Persons
Disallowable Input Tax on Imports, other Purchases and Adjustments
Disallowable Input Tax on Suspended Purchases
Allowable Input Tax excluding B/F Amounts (7–8)

LK_VAT_001E_9.balance_c * (LK_VAT_001E_C.balance_a + LK_VAT_001E_D.balance_a + LK_VAT_001E_D1.balance_a) / (LK_VAT_001E_A.balance_a + LK_VAT_001E_A1.balance_a + LK_VAT_001E_A2.balance_a + LK_VAT_001E_B.balance_a + LK_VAT_001E_C.balance_a + LK_VAT_001E_D.balance_a + LK_VAT_001E_D1.balance_a)
Not belongs to above {(9+10-11) or 100% of cage 0+1+1A+2 whichever is lower}
Unabsorbed Excess Input Tax C/F to next Quarter (9+10-13)
The aggregate Input Tax set off against VAT after 01/01/2011
The aggregate Input Tax set off against other taxes payable to CGIR
The aggregate input Tax set off against taxes payable to DGC
Tax Credit based on SVAT Credit Voucher
Allowed Deemed Input Credit on Wholesale and Retail R2 R3=(R3B+R3F) = Lesser amount of cage 2 or {Cage 16 – (R+R1+R2}
Claimed Credit on Stock for the Period
Credit on purchases for the Period
Claimed Credit on purchases for the Period
Claim for this Period out of Cage L
The Input tax set off against other taxes payable to CGIR (IT/ESC/NBT)
The Input tax set off against taxes payable to DGC
Total claimed from Unabsorbed Input Tax (S+S1A+S1B+S1C+S2)
LK_VAT_001E_Q.balance_c + LK_VAT_001E_R.balance_c + LK_VAT_001E_R1.balance_c + LK_VAT_001E_R2.balance_c + LK_VAT_001E_R3.balance_c + LK_VAT_001E_S.balance_c
